acceptanceCriteria.evidence: tests/test-standalone-cli.sh packed and installed the npm artifact, verified the hrn executable exists, the legacy executable does not, and help identifies Harness.

tests/test-standalone-cli.sh verified persisted quietStartup: true, preserved an existing theme setting, and proved a trusted project quietStartup:false still resolves to true through the pinned Pi SettingsManager.
tests/test-standalone-cli.sh verified the mock provider received the bundled instruction requiring a visible tool-purpose update before each tool call or independent batch.
npm ci --ignore-scripts and npm test passed; npm test ran installer, packed standalone CLI, workflow-context, child-agent, and release/Homebrew checks.
Opened https://github.com/jwoo0122/harness/pull/9 with Conventional Commit title feat(cli)!: rename Harness command to hrn.

remainingRisks: Quiet-startup enforcement relies on the pinned Pi 0.80.6 SettingsManager internal module and must be revalidated when Pi is upgraded.
